meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Project Management for Freelancers: Scale Your AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to leverage project management with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver enterprise-grade solutions for your clients.
content.answer_block: To break free from basic app limitations, implement a structured project management workflow using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement. By treating every client project as a modular system rather than a single script, you increase delivery speed, improve code maintainability, and command higher freelance rates.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the late-night panic when a simple project spirals into spaghetti code, or the sinking feeling that your work looks like every other 'AI wrapper' on the market. You are stuck building basic apps because you lack the architectural rigor to scale. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-earning developer isn't just coding speed—it's project management.

Today, we shift from 'coding' to 'engineering.' By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent, intent-based implementation, you will transform your workflow. This isn't just about building faster; it's about building systems that your clients can't live without.

steps.title: Define the System Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, map out your data flow and modular components to ensure long-term scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Software Architect. Design a modular project structure for a client-facing AI project management dashboard. Focus on clean separation of concerns, API routes, and database schema.

steps.title: Bootstrap with Antigravity
steps.description: Generate the boilerplate and infrastructure code in seconds, skipping the tedious setup phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js boilerplate with Supabase integration, Tailwind CSS, and a structured project management task entity model.

steps.title: Implement AI-Assisted Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write your core business logic while maintaining strict adherence to your architectural constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for managing project tasks, including status updates, priority sorting, and automated AI task summaries.

steps.title: Automate Testing and QA
steps.description: Ensure your project management tool is robust by automating unit tests for critical paths.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of Jest tests for the task management service, specifically testing for edge cases in task status transitions.

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor
steps.description: Finalize the production build and configure monitoring to ensure your client's project runs without downtime.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration script for Vercel and set up basic error logging using Sentry integration.

pro_tips: Always maintain an architecture.md file; Claude Code uses this as a 'source of truth' to prevent code drift during iterative updates.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation as you code; clients pay double for well-documented, maintainable systems.
When using Claude Code, always include the --context flag pointing to your documentation to keep the AI aligned with your specific style guide.
Modularize your database schemas into smaller files to avoid massive migration files that are hard to debug.
Implement 'feature flags' in your scaffolding so you can deploy incomplete features without breaking the production environment.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder structure. Replace your manual boilerplate with an Antigravity-generated template to immediately reduce your setup time by 70%.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps that don't scale. By mastering these tools, you move from a developer who writes scripts to an architect who builds businesses. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
